utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know . Let try a look ... of far off ... wonderment .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , we will ... we will gaze into our future and we will think about our marriage and the days to come .

emotion_cause.span: 2_we will think about our marriage and the days to come .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Chandler ! What is the matter with your face ? !

emotion_cause.span: 3_What is the matter with your face ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I mean this picture is supposed to say " Geller and Bing to be married , " not " Local woman saves drowning moron ! "

emotion_cause.span: 4_this picture is supposed to say " Geller and Bing to be married , " not " Local woman saves drowning moron ! "

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey ! Do not laugh at him !
